name: ninebot_login
description: Authenticate a Ninebot user with username and password to obtain an access token. Use this first before listing devices or fetching device info. The token is required for subsequent API calls.

username.description: Ninebot account username (email, phone, or username)

name: ninebot_list_devices
description: List all Ninebot devices associated with an authenticated user. Use this after ninebot_login to get the list of scooters/bikes. Returns device SN and name for each device. Use ninebot_get_device_info to get detailed status for a specific device.

lang.description: Language for responses: zh (Chinese), zh-hant (Traditional Chinese), en (English)

name: ninebot_get_device_info
description: Get detailed status information for a specific Ninebot device including battery level, power status, location, and other telemetry. Use this after ninebot_login and ninebot_list_devices to get the full details of a selected device. Returns battery, status, location, estimateMileage, chargingState, pwr, and gsm values.

sn.description: Device serial number (SN) obtained from ninebot_list_devices
